lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਟਿਕ ਨਿਰਧਨ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਗੁਨੀ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੨੭॥
lines.translit: andhule ttik niradhan dhan paaeo prabh naanak anik gunee |2|2|127|
lines.english: The support of the blind, the wealth of the poor; Nanak has found God, of endless virtues. ||2||2||127||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਗਤ ਅਨਿਕ ਜਨ ਤਾਰੇ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਮੁਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhagat anik jan taare simareh anik munee |
lines.english: You have saved so many devotees, so many humble servants; so many silent sages contemplate You.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Thirteenth House, Partaal:
I am sad, sad and depressed.
When will You come home? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਵੈ ਹਾਰ ਕਜਰ ਬਸਤ੍ਰ ਅਭਰਨ ਕੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: mohan need na aavai haavai haar kajar basatr abharan keene |
lines.english: O Enticing Lord, I cannot sleep; I sigh. I am adorned with necklaces, gowns, ornaments and make-up.
When will He come to my home? ||1||
I seek the Sanctuary of the happy soul-brides; I place my head upon their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਹੁ ਸਹੇਰੀ ਮਿਲਨ ਬਾਤ ਕਹਉ ਸਗਰੋ ਅਹੰ ਮਿਟਾਵਹੁ ਤਉ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਲਾਲਨੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu saheree milan baat khau sagaro ahan mittaavahu tau ghar hee laalan paavahu |
lines.english: Listen, my companions: tell me how to meet Him. Eradicate all egotism, and then you shall find your Beloved Lord within the home of your heart.
Unite me with my Beloved.
Then, in delight, you shall sing the songs of joy and praise.
The Enticing Lord has revealed His form to me,
and then, I found my Beloved. ||2||
O Nanak, I came to the Lord's Door,
Meditate on the Lord, the embodiment of bliss.
How sweet is the story of my Husband Lord.
My thirst is totally quenched,
and now, I am absorbed in celestial bliss.
and now, sleep seems sweet to me.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨੁ ਲਾਲਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਰੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥੧੨੮॥
lines.translit: mohan laalan paaeo ree | rahaau doojaa |1|128|
lines.english: I have found my Beloved, Enticing Lord. ||Second Pause||1||128||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਰੀ ਅਹੰ ਜਾਇ ਦਰਸਨ ਪਾਵਤ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: moree ahan jaae darasan paavat he |
lines.english: My ego is gone; I have obtained the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਚਹੁ ਨਾਥ ਹੀ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੰਤਨਾ ॥ ਅਬ ਚਰਨ ਗਹੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raachahu naath hee sahaaee santanaa | ab charan gahe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am absorbed in my Lord and Master, the help and support of the Saints. Now, I hold tight to His Feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਹੇ ਮਨ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ਚਰਨਾਵੈ ਚਰਨਾਵੈ ਉਲਝਿਓ ਅਲਿ ਮਕਰੰਦ ਕਮਲ ਜਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: aahe man avar na bhaavai charanaavai charanaavai ulajhio al makarand kamal jiau |
lines.english: My mind longs for Him, and does not love any other. I am totally absorbed, in love with His Lotus Feet, like the bumble bee attached to the honey of the lotus flower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸ ਨਹੀ ਚਾਹੈ ਏਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਹੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: an ras nahee chaahai ekai har laahai |1|
lines.english: I do not desire any other taste; I seek only the One Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਤੇ ਟੂਟੀਐ ਰਿਖ ਤੇ ਛੂਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: an te ttootteeai rikh te chhootteeai |
lines.english: I have broken away from the others, and I have been released from the Messenger of Death.
There is no other, none other than the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਘੂਟੀਐ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਉਲਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: man har ras ghootteeai sang saadhoo ulatteeai |
lines.english: O mind, drink in the subtle essence of the Lord; join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and turn away from the world.
O Nanak, love the Feet, the Feet of the Lord. ||2||2||129||
Raag Bilaaval, Ninth Mehl, Dho-Padhay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਾਮਲੁ ਗਨਿਕਾ ਜਿਹ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮੁਕਤ ਭਏ ਜੀਅ ਜਾਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ajaamal ganikaa jih simarat mukat bhe jeea jaano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, even Ajaamal the robber and Ganikaa the prostitute were liberated; let your soul know this. ||1||Pause||
The Name of the Lord is the Dispeller of sorrow - realize this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਜ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟੀ ਛਿਨਹੂ ਮਹਿ ਜਬ ਹੀ ਰਾਮੁ ਬਖਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: gaj kee traas mittee chhinahoo meh jab hee raam bakhaano |
lines.english: The elephant's fear was taken away in an instant, as soon as he chanted the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਦ ਕਹਤ ਸੁਨਤ ਧ੍ਰੂਅ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਭਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਲਪਟਾਨੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naarad kehat sunat dhraooa baarik bhajan maeh lapattaano |1|
lines.english: Listening to Naarad's teachings, the child Dhroo was absorbed in deep meditation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹਤ ਭਗਤ ਰਛਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਤਾਹਿ ਤੁਮ ਮਾਨੋ ॥੨॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kehat bhagat rachhak har nikatt taeh tum maano |2|1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Lord is the Saving Grace and the Protector of His devotees; believe it - He is close to you. ||2||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਲ ਅਮਰ ਨਿਰਭੈ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਜਗਤ ਜਾਹਿ ਹੈਰਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: achal amar nirabhai pad paaeo jagat jaeh hairaano |
lines.english: He obtained the immovable, eternal state of fearlessness, and all the world was amazed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam binaa dukh paavai |
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, you shall only find pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਹਸਾ ਨਹ ਚੂਕੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਭੇਦੁ ਬਤਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat binaa sahasaa neh chookai gur ihu bhed bataavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without devotional worship, doubt is not dispelled; the Guru has revealed this secret. ||1||Pause||
Bilaaval, Ninth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਭਇਓ ਤੀਰਥ ਬ੍ਰਤ ਕੀਏ ਰਾਮ ਸਰਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa bheo teerath brat kee raam saran nahee aavai |
lines.english: Of what use are sacred shrines of pilgrimage, if one does not enter the Sanctuary of the Lord?
